GG0130F3_UPR_DRSNG_END_CD GG0130F3 Discharge Performance Upper Dressing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to put on and remove shirt or pajama top at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to put on and remove shirt or pajama top at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 =
